first-hello.title: 👋 Quick Question
first-hello.description: Engaging opener that identifies user intent

actions.desc: Hey! Quick question - what brings you to Fineguide today?

Are you looking to:

🎯 Capture more leads
💬 Automate customer support
📞 Improve call center quality

Or just exploring?

pain-support-overwhelm.title: 😰 Drowning in Tickets?
pain-support-overwhelm.description: For users struggling with support volume

actions.desc: I hear you. Support teams are stretched thin everywhere.
Here's the thing: 70% of support questions are repetitive. Same questions, over and over.
What if an AI handled those automatically - accurately - so your team only dealt with the complex stuff?
That's exactly what we do. Companies using Fineguide cut their ticket volume by 60-80%.
Want to see how it works with YOUR actual support questions? I can show you in 2 minutes.

pain-losing-leads.title: 💸 Losing Leads?
pain-losing-leads.description: For users worried about missed opportunities

actions.desc: Let me guess - visitors come to your site, have questions, and leave without converting?
Here's what most businesses don't realize: 78% of leads go to whoever responds FIRST.
An AI agent responds instantly. 24/7. While qualifying leads and booking meetings for you.
One of our clients went from capturing 12 leads/month to 89. Same traffic.
Curious what that could look like for your business?
Here's a scary stat: 35-40% of website visits happen outside business hours.
If you're not there, you're losing those people. Period.
An AI agent works nights, weekends, holidays. Never calls in sick. And it actually KNOWS your business.
It can answer questions, capture leads, even schedule demos - all while you sleep.
Want me to show you how one client captured 43% more leads just by being 'always on'?
Support costs keep going up, right? More customers = more tickets = more hires.
But here's the math: One AI agent handles unlimited conversations for less than one support rep's salary.
And it handles the boring stuff - FAQs, order status, basic troubleshooting - so your humans do what humans do best.
Most companies see 40-60% cost reduction within 3 months.
Want to run the numbers for your business? Takes 2 minutes.
Managing call center quality is brutal. Listening to recordings, scoring calls, finding patterns...
What if AI did all that automatically? Every single call, analyzed instantly.
Our Voice QA catches compliance issues, identifies training gaps, and scores agents - without anyone listening to a single recording.
One call center found 3x more compliance violations in the first week. Before a customer ever complained.
Curious how it works?
Fair concern. Generic chatbots are terrible. We all hate them.
Fineguide is different. It's trained specifically on YOUR content - your docs, your FAQs, your website.
It doesn't make stuff up. If it doesn't know something, it says so and escalates to a human.
Plus, you review and improve its responses over time. It gets smarter.
Want to test it? Ask me anything about Fineguide right now - I'm an example of what you'd have.
I get it. No one wants another 3-month implementation project.
Here's the truth: You can have a working AI agent in about 30 minutes.
Just point it at your website or upload your docs. It learns automatically.
One line of code to add it to your site. That's it.
Want me to show you the setup process? It's surprisingly simple.
Let me share some real numbers from our customers:
🏪 E-commerce company: 73% fewer support tickets, $340K saved annually

📞 Call center: 95% of calls auto-analyzed, 47% improvement in compliance
These aren't cherry-picked. This is typical for companies that actually use the platform.

just-browsing.title: 👀 Just Looking
just-browsing.description: For explorers not ready to engage

actions.desc: No problem! Browse around, I'm here if you have questions.
Quick tip: the /demo page lets you see our AI on your own website without signing up.
And if you want the full story, /ai-agents has all the details on what we do.
I'll be here. Just ask when you need me! 👋
Hey, welcome back! 👋
Last time you were checking us out. Any new questions I can help with?
Or if you're ready to dive in, I can help you get started right now.
Our pricing is based on AI interactions - we call them 'credits'.
One credit = one AI conversation. Simple.
Most small businesses use 5,000-10,000 credits/month. That's $99/mo.
Growing teams usually need 20-50K credits. That's $249/mo.
The math usually works out to way less than hiring a support person.
